checklist.label: Start Claude Code in a real PTY without claude -p.
Keep the same CLI alive across a Bot restart.
Complete 20 consecutive turns in one Session.

34.1.notes: Native Claude Code PTY, no claude -p, Bot restart, and 20-turn Session run.

checklist.label: Open a local terminal window on the target OS with native TUI visible.
Confirm first local key acquires the human lease and Bot input queues.
Release control back to Bot and confirm no crossed input.

34.2.notes: Visible terminal, human lease takeover, Bot input blocking, release, and no crossed input.

checklist.label: Create and bind a Session in a real OneBot V11 group.
Observe incremental answers and tool progress on the Bot platform.
Answer questions, approve or deny requests, and confirm long code formatting.

34.3.notes: OneBot group create/bind, incremental answers, tool progress, questions, approvals, fallback text, and long code.

checklist.label: Validate real group member role mappings.
Confirm button callback re-authorization with platform user IDs.
Review approvals in Admin and verify workdir restrictions.

34.4.notes: Group role auth, callback re-authorization, Admin review, approval audit, and workdir restrictions.

checklist.label: Bind at least three projects in one Bot chat.
Set one unique default project.
Verify /agent project list/use/info with names, aliases, and short IDs.

34.5.notes: Three projects in one group, default project, project commands, allowed roots, quotas, and Admin view.

checklist.label: Run at least three concurrent Sessions under one project.
Restart Bot or control clients and verify session switching.
Confirm switching never closes or cross-writes other Sessions.

34.6.notes: Three independent Sessions, session commands, unsafe ambiguity handling, queues, restart recovery, and no cross-write.

checklist.label: Confirm OneBot text /agent commands in the deployed adapter.
Confirm action callbacks route through the deployed adapter.
Verify missing-argument recovery paths.

34.7.notes: OneBot /agent commands, unified invocations, auth, idempotency, interaction fallback, trace IDs, and unknown commands.

checklist.label: Disconnect and reconnect the Control Plane from a running local CLI.
Replay missed events after reconnect.
Validate the OS-specific terminal backend recovery path used in production.

34.8.notes: Control Plane disconnect, event replay, old epoch rejection, interaction expiry, and Bot retry/degradation.
